title: 2. After insertion and arrival of numb/sore/distention, rotate the needle and as
text:
the affected part slightly.
In our knee example, have the patient move the affected knee. You can manipulate the needle every
10 minutes then have the patient move the affected area. Remember that one point can treat many
different things – having the patient move the affected part sends the Qi directly to the area rather
than scattering it to every other application!
